## What should have happened?
<!-- What did you expect the bot to do? -->

paste input guide here

paste output here

</details>

### 3. Console/Agent Log (required)

<summary>Console log</summary>

```
paste full console log here
```
</details>

### 4. Screenshots (optional)
<!-- If available, check the recording directory for PNGs showing what the bot was looking at when it got stuck. Attach the most relevant ones. -->
